◎简　　介  

　　My father would always tell us the story about how he walked for 7 days and 6 nights before swimming for 4 hours to Macau to escape starvation in 1966.His story would fall on my deaf ears as I was more concerned with being American.Ever since his restaurant went bankrupt, my father feels like he failed at the American dream.That’s when he started talking about moving back to...
